welcome_offer.description: Elevated offer watch: earn up to 200,000 Marriott Bonvoy bonus points after eligible purchases within the first 6 months. Verify issuer-visible terms before applying because Marriott Amex offers rotate.
notes: Adaptor coverage added so future sweeps can detect whether the 200k Brilliant offer is active again or expired.
Production card currently contains a stale/historical upgrade-offer style value; do not auto-apply unless issuer/Marriott page confirms public terms.
source_conflicts: Prior 200k Brilliant offer was reported with a May 2026 end date; current issuer page must confirm before production update.

open_questions: Confirm whether the 200k Brilliant offer is currently active or only historical/expired.
If active, verify exact spend requirement, end date, and whether the offer is public, targeted, or as-high-as.

community.summary: Adds adaptor coverage for Marriott Bonvoy Brilliant so elevated 200k offer drift can be monitored instead of relying on stale production data.

observations.source: American Express Marriott Bonvoy Brilliant page
observations.excerpt: Issuer page should be checked for active 200,000-point Brilliant welcome offer terms.
